node.text: Your clothes look good, as beautiful as the moonlight, and you should understand what you are saying.
Men and their obsession with dictating women what to do. Plus ganay ke nechay Islam ye sikhata hai ke hamary pyary mehboob ka naam likhein. Shame on you aja0ye
